name: Guard Brasil MCP
description: LGPD PII detection for Brazilian text as a Model Context Protocol server. Detects CPF, CNPJ, RG, MASP, emails, phones, addresses and 16 PII patterns with masking support.

tools.name: guard_inspect
tools.description: Full LGPD PII inspection — detects 16 Brazilian PII patterns, masks values, returns ATRiAN ethics validation

tools.name: guard_scan_pii
tools.description: Quick PII scan — returns counts by type (CPF/CNPJ/RG/email/phone/address)

tools.name: guard_check_safe
tools.description: Safety gate — boolean check if text is safe for public sharing
